prompt: I need to write my standup update for the team. Been working on the user auth refactor for the past couple days and just finished a code review on the payments module. What should I cover?

assertions.check: Response explicitly mentions loading standup.md and applies its structure (Yesterday/Today/Blockers)

assertions.description: Applies standup structure to user input
assertions.check: Response categorizes user's auth work + code review into Yesterday section, provides Today next-steps prompt, mentions blockers
Suggests PR numbers, specific auth subtasks, or follow-up actions the user might have forgotten
